allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add safe area inset for status bar and fixed header

- Add viewport-fit=cover meta tag for safe area support
- Add body padding for safe area inset
- Add purple pseudo-element to fill status bar area
- Make user header bar fixed position below safe area

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(php -l golfers.php tournaments.php rounds.php matches.php hole_scores.php match_golfers.php match_results.php tournament_golfers.php tournament_teams.php tournament_settings.php tournament_formats.php flights.php golfers_flights.php)

Bash(/Applications/XAMPP/xamppfiles/bin/php -l golfers.php tournaments.php rounds.php matches.php hole_scores.php match_golfers.php match_results.php tournament_golfers.php tournament_teams.php tournament_settings.php tournament_formats.php flights.php golfers_flights.php get_match_data.php get_match_data_flat.php save_guys_trip_matches.php saveAllMatchData.php save_tee_time_assignments.php save_tournament_assignments.php lock_handicaps.php create_quick_round.php create_rabbit_round.php create_wolf_round.php tee_times.php delete_tee_time.php holes.php app_settings.php courses.php get_course_tees.php)

Bash(/Applications/XAMPP/xamppfiles/bin/php -l get_best_ball_match.php get_rabbit_match.php get_wolf_match.php get_match_by_code.php get_match_by_tournament.php get_quick_round_history.php get_tee_time_assignments.php get_tournament_assignments.php get_user_tournaments.php get_all_user_tournaments.php create_golfer.php delete_golfer.php update_golfer.php update_round.php save_wolf_partner.php)
Bash(mysql -u root -e "DESCRIBE sandbagger.courses; SELECT org_id, name FROM sandbagger.organizations;")

Bash(echo "=== converters ==="; which rsvg-convert inkscape convert magick 2>/dev/null; echo "=== node/sharp ==="; which node npx 2>/dev/null; echo "=== bebas font ==="; ls ~/Library/Fonts 2>/dev/null | grep -i bebas; find /Library/Fonts /System/Library/Fonts -iname '*bebas*' 2>/dev/null; echo "=== done ===")
Bash(awk 'NR<=3200 && /^function [a-zA-Z]+/ {fn=$0; ln=NR} NR==2186 || NR==2441 || NR==2834 || NR==3123 {print NR": "fn" \(line "ln"\)"}' script.js)
Bash(awk 'NR<=1990 && /^function [a-zA-Z]+/ {fn=$0; ln=NR} NR==1933 {print "1933 is in: "fn" \(line "ln"\)"}' script.js)
